title: Feedback - send a Other feedback without names/email
scenario: "Other" type feedback can be sent from App Settings > Feedback without providing a name or email
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on 'App Settings' (gear icon or settings option).
In the Feedback screen, tap on the 'Other' option (category selector).
Enter feedback text in the text input field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
expected: Feedback is sent successfully. The app should accept the submission even when Name and Email fields are left empty for the "Other" category.
